title: senecio nemorensis subsp. apuanus
intro: Senecio nemorensis subsp. apuanus is a rare subspecies of the woodland wormwood plant, native to the Apuan Alps in Italy. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio nemorensis subsp. apuanus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting relaxation. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
